ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-04-2008 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-20-2007 Continued To Jan-14-08 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

Default Prove-Up.
Off Calendar Nov-19-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Helen Holt-Smith.
Arnold I. Berschler, Esq. for Plaintiff: Carmen Castillo, present, was sworn and direct examined.
After hearing the testimony and evidence presented, matter submitted and taken under submission.
Counsel to prepare a one page summary of damages and a proposed Judgment for signature.

November 19, 2007
The Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant: Evan Ian Terzulli as follows:
Damages/Principal $58,950.15
Punitive Damages $58,950.15
Costs per memo for a total of $117,900.30
Judgment signed
